feed.title: Mercercrest Bridge Club Blog
feed.subtitle: A blog for the Mercercrest Bridge Club, mostly for results postings.

entry.title: April 14, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Good luck to everyone who is playing in the Leavenworth Regional!

We will have a club championship in 2 weeks on April 28!

Congratulations to Doug and Joe - tonight’s winners.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260414E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260414Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Good luck to everyone who is playing in the Leavenworth Regional!

entry.title: April 07, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Tonight’s winners were Bryant and Andrew, winning all strats, congrats! First N/S were Kim and Dave. First in B N/S were Elaine and Jim.

Remember there are Captain’s Teams this Sunday, advance sign up required.

Something came up today that I did not know, so I’m sharing the rule here. Our club runs under the Open+ chart. Even on that chart there are restrictions on what you need to open 2c. Under the Open+ chart, you must be both within a trick of game and have at least 5 A/K control points for a 2c opening to be legal. The hand in question tonight was KQJxxx KQJxxxx void void. If it’s a 2c opener for your partnership, you must alert your 2c openers, as I understand the rule.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260407E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260407Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

entry.title: March 17, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Winners tonight were Kim and Jeff. Flight B winners were Nick and Craig. Flight C winners were Arjun and Yi-Tsung. N/S winners were Aaron and Bogdan.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260317E.htm

entry.title: February 24, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

Please remember we are closed next week, please join us again in two weeks! Best of luck to the 75% of our club in St Louis, watch for their names in lights.

Tonight’s winners were Cheerful Mike and his student, first in B were Oyvind and his student, first in C were Joe and his student.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260224E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260224Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game.

entry.title: February 17, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. We have our usual game next week, and then we will be closed the first Tuesday in March.

Our winners tonight were Dave and Cornel. Flight B winners were Chris and Adam. Flight C winners were John and Nathan.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260217E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260217Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. We have our usual game next week, and then we will be closed the first Tuesday in March.

entry.title: February 10, 2026 Results
entry.content:
Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Good luck to everyone in the Sectional this weekend in Shoreline!

Winners tonight were Bogdan and Jeff followed by Kim and Eric. Flight B winners were Chris and David. Flight C winners were Shannon and Nathan.

Full results are available at https://mercerislandbridge.github.io/2026/260210E.htm

Common game results are available at https://thecommongame.com/NiteResults/20260210Rank.html
entry.summary: Thanks for coming to tonight’s game. Good luck to everyone in the Sectional this weekend in Shoreline!
